seoTitle: Carey Bay vs Carinda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carey Bay and Carinda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Carey Bay vs Carinda: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carey Bay and Carinda.
heading: Carey Bay vs Carinda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carey Bay, New South Wales and Carinda, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carinda has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Carey Bay (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carey Bay or Carinda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carey Bay has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Carinda scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carey Bay scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Carinda scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carey Bay or Carinda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carinda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
